summary: Dashboard loading state displays correctly with proper mobile layout, billing information, and usage tracking. Minor palette violations present where neutral backgrounds are used instead of brand colors, but core functionality and state contract are intact.

violations.description: Dashboard uses neutral gray/white UI surfaces instead of diner palette - should use cream #fff8ea for card backgrounds rather than neutral whites
Logged-in dashboard surface uses generic neutral palette instead of maintaining brand palette consistency with public surfaces

actions: Update dashboard card backgrounds to use cream #fff8ea from brand palette
Ensure authenticated UI surfaces maintain visual consistency with public brand treatment
Verify mobile drawer navigation remains accessible as specified in screen contract
